activity_name: Register the SSN of the patient

llm_result.activity_name: Register the SSN of the patient

ground_truth_steps.description: Ask the patient for their Social Security Number (SSN)

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps describe the same action of asking/requesting the patient's SSN. The wording is nearly identical.

ground_truth_steps.description: Verify the SSN format for accuracy

response_steps.description: Verify SSN for accuracy with patient.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps involve verifying the SSN for accuracy. The ground truth focuses on format verification, while the response includes verification with the patient, but the core function is the same.

ground_truth_steps.description: Input the SSN into the registration system

response_steps.description: Enter SSN into the designated field in HIS.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps describe entering the SSN into a system. 'Input' and 'Enter' are synonyms, and 'registration system' is functionally equivalent to 'HIS' (Hospital Information System).
